content.en:
In an instant.

Ye Tian came to the treasure, this is a purple mountain,

Ye Tian knew that the items he needed were inside the purple mountain, but this purple mountain was also an extraordinary thing, I was afraid that it was extremely strong, and even he was not easy to cut.

"Take it all!"

Ye Tian quickly put this purple mountain into the void in his body, and then quickly left here.

The other side.

Ye Tian's copied body led away the primordial ancient who was comparable to the sevenfold original ancestor, and the body was shattered again and again, and the primordial ancient beads on his body became less and less.

"It's in hand, this replica body can fall!"

Ye Tian stopped resisting.

However, at this time, a half-step sevenfold ancestor appeared, appeared here, and happened to collide.

Bang!

Ye Tian's replica body was directly exploded and fell in an instant.

And the primordial man had his eyes on the half-step sevenfold ancestor.

"This is the primordial ancients comparable to the Sevenfold Ancestor, who brought it out!!"

That half-step sevenfold ancestor wants to cry without tears, what kind of bad luck is this!

"I'm going out!"

This half-step sevenfold ancestor wanted to leave this ancient nest, otherwise if he was still in this ancient nest, he would definitely die.

However, it takes time to get out of this nest, and will this primordial man give him time?

Just as he was about to leave, this primordial artifact crushed his body with one hand, and all his will was wiped out, and he was killed in an instant.

It can be said that he is very unlucky, but his strength is not good.

......

"The copy body was killed, but it doesn't matter, it's enough to harvest this treasure!" Ye Tian muttered.

Immediately, he found a remote place with few resources, and then hid it, and then prepared to take out the treasure he needed from the purple mountain.

Thundered!!!

Ye Tian attacked the purple hill again and again, and finally pierced the purple hill and took out a drop of purple water from it.

"That's it!"

Ye Tian could sense the strong attraction of the copying talent and wanted to devour this drop of purple water.

So, Ye Tian swallowed it in one gulp.

Rumble!!!!

The energy of this drop of purple water poured into Ye Tian's replication talent, helping the replication talent to upgrade.

At the same time, endless pain hits.

However, Ye Tian forcibly held back.

After a long time, the pain receded, and Ye Tian felt that his copying talent had changed dramatically, and his own potential had naturally improved.

He researched it and soon knew what had changed in the copying talent.

The first is the ability to copy everything, before he could only copy one item, and if he wanted to copy other items, he had to undo the previous item.

But now, he can duplicate three items at the same time, which greatly increases his ability.

And items that couldn't be copied in the past should now be able to be copied as well.

Plus, he can fuse those Extreme Dao Ancestors!

Before, Ye Tian had copied countless Extreme Dao Ancestral Fu, but these Extreme Dao Ancestral Fu could not be fused with each other, as if the Extreme Dao Ancestral Fu was the limit.

But now, the newly upgraded Copying talent pushes that limit.

"It will take a long time to fuse these Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowments, and after they go out, let's copy them slowly, for now, let's find more resources first!"

Ye Tian thought about it and left here.

Soon, he encountered some primordial ancients.

This time, he habitually used his talent for copying to probe these primordial ancients.

He was directly shocked by this investigation.

Race: Primordial Antiquities

【Yuan Dao Ancestor Fu: Immortality】

......

In the past, Ye Tian explored the Primordial Antiquities, as if there was a power in the dark that shielded his copying talent from exploring, resulting in only the information of the Primordial Antiquities race, and could not detect the Yuan Dao Ancestor.

"No wonder these primordial ancients are difficult to kill, it turns out that they have the Immortal Yuan Dao Ancestral Endowment!" Ye Tian suddenly realized.

It is precisely because the primordial ancients possessed such a Yuan Dao ancestral endowment that it was difficult to be killed, even if it was blown up again and again, it was almost unscathed.

And even if the Dao Ancestors had the Primordial Ancient Beads, it was impossible for them to have such an effect, and the reason for this was the Immortal Yuan Dao Ancestor Fu.

"Copy!"

Ye Tian immediately copied the Immortal Dao Ancestor Fu of the primordial ancients.

In an instant, he killed these primordial ancients one by one, but there was a primordial ancient who was comparable to a half-step sevenfold primordial ancestor, and it took him a long time to kill him.

Soon after, Ye Tian also successfully fused the Immortal Yuan Dao Ancestor Fu and had his own first Yuan Dao Ancestor Fu.

After possessing this Yuan Dao Ancestral Endowment, Ye Tian's life-saving ability skyrocketed, and with the Primordial Ancient Bead, it was almost difficult to be killed.

After all, the Primordial Ancients wouldn't use other Primordial Ancient Beads, and he would!

He could now completely absorb the special energy contained in a primordial ancient pearl, and it was a perfect use, which could be called a true immortal.

At this moment, even if he encountered the Primordial Ancient who was comparable to the Sevenfold Ancestor, he would not be killed by it.

Other than that.

Ye Tian tried to comprehend his Endless Yuan Dao, and found that the speed of comprehension was much faster.

"My Endless Yuan Dao is made by fusing three hundred and sixty-five extreme extreme paths, and among them is the Immortal Extreme Extreme Dao, now that I have the Immortal Yuan Dao Ancestral Endowment, it is equivalent to upgrading in talent, and my comprehension will naturally increase greatly, and it will be easier to comprehend the Endless Yuan Dao!"

Immediately, Ye Tian thought about it, if he fused all the other extreme extreme paths into the Yuan Dao Ancestor Fu, wouldn't he be able to gain an incredible degree of comprehension in the Yuan Dao?

At that time, it would be easy for him to comprehend the Endless Yuan Dao to the realm of Xiaocheng, Dacheng, or even Consummation!

Even, it was not difficult for him to comprehend the Endless Yuan Dao to the extreme realm.

"Comprehend the Endless Yuan Dao of the Extreme Realm, and step into the Eightfold Origin Ancestor in the future, there will be no bottleneck for me!"

As soon as he thought of this, Ye Tian was very excited.

In the following days, Ye Tian found a lot of resources, and even the treasures that assisted in the impact of the Sevenfold Ancestor, he snatched several of them.

......

Nest 13, somewhere.

Half-step Sevenfold Ancestors gathered here, and these Half-Step Sevenfold Ancestors were all the top Half-Step Sevenfold Ancestors of the major forces.

Almost all of them are the sons of the major forces who have comprehended the half-step sevenfold origin ancestor of the nine-fold yuan path, and there are also a few who have not comprehended the nine-fold yuan path, but they have comprehended a very special eightfold yuan path, and they have broken the boundary of sixty-four times, comprehended the top yuan path control technique, and reached the limit of the half-step sevenfold origin ancestor, and their strength is also very strong.

At this time, they gathered here for a treasure.

"The Sanqing Dao Fruit is about to be successfully bred, there are only eight in total, everyone, how about snatching it by yourself when the time comes?"

The half-step sevenfold ancestor of the Hanhai Palace, Zixuan Dao Ancestor, proposed.
